zh.title: 破解股东利用知识产权虚假出资的“金蝉脱壳”术：法律路径与实务指南
zh.lead: 小股东以一款游戏的知识产权作价300万出资。但债权人发现，该知识产权实际价值远低于认缴金额，导致公司无财产可供执行...

blocks.text: ——公司无财产可供执行？债权人如何绝地反击
问题背景：股东“空手套白狼”的典型套路
注册资本3900万的公司，小股东以一款游戏的知识产权作价300万出资。但债权人发现，该知识产权实际价值远低于认缴金额，导致公司无财产可供执行，股东却试图通过“评估报告”逃避责任。债权人虽已胜诉并追加股东为被执行人，但股东提出执行异议之诉，案件陷入僵局。
核心矛盾点：如何证明知识产权出资不实？如何突破原有评估报告的“合法性”？
法律武器库：击穿虚假出资的三大核心依据
非货币出资的法定要求——权属转移+评估作价
根据《公司法》第48、49条及《公司法司法解释三》第9、10条，股东可以用实物、知识产权、土地使用权、股权、债权等可以用货币估价并可以依法转让的非货币财产作价出资，以知识产权出资需完成两项义务：
✅权属变更：将知识产权过户至公司名下；
✅评估作价：由合法评估机构出具报告，不得虚高作价。
法律后果：未完成权属转移或评估价显著偏低的，视为未履行出资义务，股东需补足差额。
股东出资不实的连带责任
《公司法》第二十三条第一款　公司股东滥用公司法人独立地位和股东有限责任，逃避债务，严重损害公司债权人利益的，应当对公司债务承担连带责任。
债权人可依据《公司法》第50条或者《公司法司法解释三》第13条，要求股东在未出资本息范围内对公司债务承担补充责任。
此外若股东滥用权利转移资产、逃避债务，严重损害公司债权人利益的，受到损害的债权人可根据《公司法》第23条主张股东与公司人格混同，要求股东承担连带责任。
破解路径：四步击穿股东“障眼法”
Step 1：申请调查令以及财产保全
股东转移资产具有隐蔽性，债权人首先需要在诉讼阶段同步申请财产保全。
其次是通过申请调查令获取该公司的工商内档，重点核查工商档案中的知识产权评估报告、知识产权登记信息、关联交易记录、权属变更记录、验资档案等。在此步骤中我们可以发现该股东用作出资的知识产权价值线索以及其中的漏洞，为下一步申请司法审计做好准备。

blocks.content: 如（2020）鲁15民再23号案中，股东未完成知识产权权属变更，法院直接认定未履行出资义务，承担补充责任。
在(2024)京03民终11534号案中，法官指出在先做出的股东会决议和章程修正案中显示的知识产权出资数额与在后作出的评估报告中知识产权的价值完全吻合，明显不合常理；其次是股东在债务危机时将货币出资变更为专利，法院以该行为降低了财产的流动性，客观上损害了债权人的利益为由，判令该行为不产生出资的法律效力。
在(2023)渝0107执异311号案中，法院认为在判断股东是否履行非专利技术出资时，还应当审查该非专利技术与公司经营目的的相关性，以防止股东“花钱买包装”，用虚假非专利技术作价出资，以合法的形式掩盖不真实的出资。这也可以作为判断股东是否是利用知识产权虚假出资的一个重要依据。

blocks.text: Step 2：申请司法审计，撕开虚假评估面纱

blocks.title: 《最高人民法院关于民事执行中财产调查若干问题的规定》（2020修正）
blocks.content: 第十七条 作为被执行人的法人或非法人组织不履行生效法律文书确定的义务，申请执行人认为其有拒绝报告、虚假报告财产情况，隐匿、转移财产等逃避债务情形或者其股东、出资人有出资不实、抽逃出资等情形的，可以书面申请人民法院委托审计机构对该被执行人进行审计。人民法院应当自收到书面申请之日起十日内决定是否准许。

blocks.text: 实务难点与破解技巧
难点1：如何说服法官启动重新评估？
通过申请调查令，获取知识产权评估报告、权属变更记录、验资档案等线索找出该出资可能存在的瑕疵，如：
债权人可通过比较市场同类知识产权交易价格、实际收益数据、取得知识产权的成本价格等证明知识产权实际价值与认缴金额差异巨大；
若知识产权未实际交付使用（如游戏未上线运营）或者该知识产权与该公司经营目的无任何相关性，可据此主张出资未完成；
提供原评估机构的“黑历史”（如行政处罚记录），直接主张原报告不可信，要求重新评估；
若该知识产权的评估报告存在未披露关键限制条件、评估参数不合理等情形，可据此主张评估程序违法；
难点2：股东主张“市场波动导致贬值”如何应对？
若股东依据《公司法司法解释三》第15条主张因市场变化导致的贬值，股东无需补足，并且表示贬值非主观恶意造成。
债权人可通过举证知识产权自始不具备高价值（如技术过时、无实际应用场景），否定“市场波动”抗辩。
Step3：申请宣告股东变更出资方式行为无效，追回转移资产
在公司债务产生后，公司债权人亦已经通过诉讼的方式要求股东出资加速到期的情况下，股东通过股东会决议变更股东出资方式逃避货币出资义务，属于滥用股东权利损害公司债权人利益的行为，为公司法所禁止，但对于该行为的法律效力，公司法没有明确规定。《最高人民法院关于适用〈中华人民共和国民法典〉总则编若干问题的解释》第三条第三款规定，构成滥用民事权利的，人民法院应当认定该滥用行为不发生相应的法律效力。

blocks.content: 在（2024）京民终3号中，股东在公司债务对外不能清偿的情况下，将货币出资变更为非货币的知识产权出资，由于《公司法》规定出资方式是公示内容，债权人是依据公示信息决定是否与公司发生交易，债权人对于出资方式具有信赖利益。非货币出资，尤其是知识产权出资，相比货币出资，其清偿能力明显受限，因此，在债务发生后股东变更出资，对债权人没有约束力，债权人仍然有权要求股东继续货币出资。

zh.conclusion: 股东利用知识产权虚假出资的“合法外衣”终将被法律击穿！债权人需善用司法审计、追加被执行人、撤销权诉讼等工具，结合刑事追责形成高压态势。唯有专业布局+快速行动，方能破解执行僵局，实现债权回款。

en.title: Cracking the "Golden Cicada Deblocking" Technique of Shareholders Using Intellectual Property Rights to Make False Capital Contributions: Legal Paths and Practical Guidelines
en.lead: The minority shareholder makes a capital contribution of 3 million yuan with the intellectual property right of a game. However, the creditor finds that the actual value of the intellectual property right is far lower than the subscribed amount, resulting in no property for the company to enforce.

blocks.text: — The company has no property to enforce? How creditors fight back
Background of the problem: the typical pattern of shareholders' "empty handed white wolf"

For a company with a registered capital of 39 million yuan, the minority shareholder shall make a capital contribution of 3 million yuan with the intellectual property right of a game. However, the creditor finds that the actual value of the intellectual property right is far lower than the subscribed amount, resulting in no property available for execution by the company, and the shareholder tries to evade liability through the "evaluation report". Although the creditor has won the lawsuit and added the shareholder as the person subjected to execution, the shareholder has filed a lawsuit against the execution, and the case has reached a deadlock.
Core contradiction: How to prove that the intellectual property investment is untrue? How to break through the "legality" of the original evaluation report?
Legal Weapons: Three Core Bases for Cracking Down on False Capital Contributions
Statutory requirements for non-monetary capital contribution — transfer of ownership + valuation

In accordance with Articles 48 and 49 of the Company Law and Articles 9 and 10 of Judicial Interpretation III of the Company Law, shareholders may make capital contributions in kind, intellectual property rights, land use rights, equity, creditor's rights and other non-monetary property that can be valued in currency and transferred according to law, and two obligations shall be fulfilled for intellectual property rights:
✅ Change of ownership: transfer the intellectual property right to the company;
✅ Appraisal and pricing: a report shall be issued by a legal appraisal institution, and the price shall not be falsely overvalued.

Legal consequences: If the transfer of ownership has not been completed or the appraisal price is significantly low, it shall be deemed that it has not fulfilled its obligation of capital contribution, and the shareholders shall make up the difference.
Joint and several liability for false capital contribution of shareholders

Paragraph 1 of Article 23 of the Company Law. Where a shareholder of a company abuses the independent status of a company as a juridical person and the limited liability of a shareholder to evade debts and seriously damages the interests of the creditors of the company, he shall bear joint and several liabilities for the debts of the company.

The creditor may, in accordance with Article 50 of the Company Law or Article 13 of the Judicial Interpretation III of the Company Law, require the shareholder to assume supplementary liability for the debts of the company within the scope of the principal and interest not contributed.

In addition, if a shareholder abuses his right to transfer assets or evade debts, which seriously damages the interests of the creditors of the company, the damaged creditor may, in accordance with Article 23 of the Company Law, claim that the shareholder is confused with the company's personality and require the shareholder to bear joint and several liability.
Cracking the Way: Four Steps to Break through the "Obstruction" of Shareholders
Step 1: Application for Investigation Order and Property Preservation
The transfer of assets by shareholders is concealed, and creditors first need to apply for property preservation simultaneously at the litigation stage.

Next, obtain the industrial and commercial internal files of the company by applying for an investigation order, focusing on the verification of intellectual property evaluation reports, intellectual property registration information, related party transaction records, ownership change records and capital verification files in the industrial and commercial archives. In this step, we can find the clues of the value of the intellectual property used by the shareholder as capital contribution and the loopholes therein, so as to prepare for the next step of applying for judicial audit.

blocks.content: If the shareholder fails to complete the change of ownership of intellectual property rights in the (2020) Case No. 23 of the 15th People's Court of Shandong Province, the court directly determines that it has not fulfilled its obligation of capital contribution and assumes supplementary liability.

In Case No. 11534 [2024] of Jing 03 Civil Division, the judge pointed out that the amount of intellectual property investment shown in the resolution of the shareholders' meeting and the amendment to the articles of association made earlier was completely consistent with the value of intellectual property in the evaluation report made later, which was obviously unreasonable; Secondly, when the shareholder changes the monetary capital contribution into a patent during the debt crisis, the court ruled that the act would not have the legal effect of capital contribution on the grounds that the act reduced the liquidity of property and objectively damaged the interests of creditors.

In the case of (2023) Yu 0107 Zhiyi No. 311, the court held that when judging whether a shareholder has fulfilled the capital contribution of non-patented technology, it should also examine the relevance of the non-patented technology to the business purpose of the company to prevent shareholders from "spending money to buy packages", making capital contributions at a price of false non-patented technology, and covering up untrue capital contributions in legal form. This can also be used as an important basis for judging whether shareholders make false capital contributions by using intellectual property rights.

blocks.text: Step 2: Apply for Judicial Audit and Peel the Veil of False Assessment

blocks.title: Provisions of the Supreme People's Court on Several Issues Concerning Property Investigation in Civil Execution (2020 Amendment)
blocks.content: Article 17 If a juridical person or unincorporated organization as the person subjected to execution fails to perform the obligations specified in the effective legal documents, and the applicant for execution considers that it has evaded its debts by refusing to report, falsely reporting its property, concealing or transferring its property, or that its shareholders or investors have made false capital contributions or withdrawn their capital contributions, it may apply in writing to the people's court for entrusting an audit institution to audit the person subjected to execution. The people's court shall decide whether to grant or not within ten days from the date of receipt of the written application.

blocks.text: Practical Difficulties and Cracking Skills
Difficulty 1: How can the judge be persuaded to initiate a reassessment?

Obtain clues such as intellectual property appraisal reports, ownership change records and capital verification files by applying for investigation orders to find out possible defects in the capital contribution, such as:

Creditors may prove that the actual value of intellectual property rights differs greatly from the amount subscribed by comparing the transaction price, actual income data and cost price of obtaining intellectual property rights of the same kind in the market;

If the intellectual property is not actually delivered for use (such as the game is not online for operation) or the intellectual property has no relevance to the business purpose of the company, it may be claimed that the capital contribution has not been completed accordingly;
Provide the "black history" of the original assessment institution (such as administrative penalty records), directly claim that the original report is not trustworthy, and request a new assessment;

If the evaluation report of the intellectual property right does not disclose the key restrictions and the evaluation parameters are unreasonable, it may be claimed that the evaluation procedure is illegal;
Difficulty 2: How to deal with the shareholder's claim that "market fluctuations lead to depreciation"?

If the shareholder claims the depreciation caused by market changes in accordance with Article 15 of Judicial Interpretation III of the Company Law, the shareholder does not need to make up for it, and indicates that the depreciation is not caused by subjective malice.

Creditors may deny the "market fluctuation" defense by proving that intellectual property rights do not have high value from the beginning (such as outdated technology and no practical application scenario).
Step 3: The application for declaring the shareholder's change in the mode of capital contribution invalid and recovering the transferred assets

After the company's debts arise, and the company's creditors have already requested the shareholders to accelerate the expiration of their capital contributions through litigation, if the shareholders change the mode of capital contribution through a shareholders' resolution to evade the obligation of monetary capital contribution, it is an act of abusing shareholders' rights to harm the interests of the company's creditors, which is prohibited by the Company Law. However, the Company Law does not explicitly stipulate the legal effect of such acts. Paragraph 3 of Article 3 of the Interpretation of the Supreme People's Court on Several Issues Concerning the Application of the General Principles of the Civil Code of the People's Republic of China stipulates that if an abuse of civil rights is constituted, the people's court shall determine that the abuse does not have corresponding legal effect.

blocks.content: In (2024) Jing Min Zhong No. 3, when the company's debts cannot be paid off to the outside world, the shareholders change the monetary capital contribution into non-monetary intellectual property capital contribution. As the Company Law stipulates that the mode of capital contribution is publicity, the creditor decides whether to trade with the company according to the publicity information, and the creditor has a trust interest in the mode of capital contribution. Non-monetary capital contribution, especially intellectual property capital contribution, is obviously limited in its solvency compared with monetary capital contribution. Therefore, if the shareholder changes the capital contribution after the debt occurs, it shall not be binding on the creditor, and the creditor shall still have the right to request the shareholder to continue to make monetary capital contribution.

en.conclusion: The "legal cloak" of shareholders who make false capital contributions by using intellectual property rights will eventually be broken down by law! Creditors should make good use of such tools as judicial audit, additional executors and revocation litigation to form a high-pressure situation in combination with criminal accountability. Only professional layout + rapid action can solve the implementation deadlock and realize the collection of creditor's rights.
